note: golden_hash filled by golden-parity.test.mjs --update. Vector 1: standard-rate traffic, no preapproval. Vector 2: CIP-0119 free-period preapproval (age within 90 days) short-circuits cost to zero. Vector 3: zero-envelope/zero-price edge (finite gate, dual compliance flags).

vectors.name: standard_rate_no_preapproval
vectors.description: 2.5 MB envelope at the CIP-0084 $60/MB rate, CC/USD 12.5 -- usd_traffic_cost 150, cc_burned 12.

output_payload.rate_source: CIP-0084 (Tokenomics Committee authority): $60/MB, calibrated so a typical Canton Coin transfer costs approximately $1. Supersedes the earlier post-CIP-0042 ~$25/MB rate -- the rate moves under committee authority and is caller-supplied here, never hard-coded.
output_payload.free_period_source: CIP-0119 (live since June 2026): transfer preapprovals get a free 90-day base duration before standard traffic cost applies.
output_payload.disambiguation: Computes synchronizer traffic economics for a single message/envelope. For settlement/counterparty structure validation on Canton, see diagnose_canton_readiness (art-503), validate_canton_dvp_atomicity (art-507), and validate_canton_party_allowlist (art-509) -- those validate structure, this computes traffic cost.

vectors.name: cip0119_free_period_preapproval
vectors.description: 1 MB transfer-preapproval envelope, 45 days old (within the CIP-0119 90-day free window) -- cost and burn both short-circuit to zero.

output_payload.rate_source: CIP-0084 (Tokenomics Committee authority): $60/MB, calibrated so a typical Canton Coin transfer costs approximately $1. Supersedes the earlier post-CIP-0042 ~$25/MB rate -- the rate moves under committee authority and is caller-supplied here, never hard-coded.
output_payload.free_period_source: CIP-0119 (live since June 2026): transfer preapprovals get a free 90-day base duration before standard traffic cost applies.
output_payload.disambiguation: Computes synchronizer traffic economics for a single message/envelope. For settlement/counterparty structure validation on Canton, see diagnose_canton_readiness (art-503), validate_canton_dvp_atomicity (art-507), and validate_canton_party_allowlist (art-509) -- those validate structure, this computes traffic cost.

vectors.name: zero_envelope_zero_price_edge
vectors.description: Zero envelope size and zero CC/USD price -- both non-positive-envelope and zero-price compliance flags fire, cc_burned short-circuits to 0 instead of dividing by zero.

output_payload.rate_source: CIP-0084 (Tokenomics Committee authority): $60/MB, calibrated so a typical Canton Coin transfer costs approximately $1. Supersedes the earlier post-CIP-0042 ~$25/MB rate -- the rate moves under committee authority and is caller-supplied here, never hard-coded.
output_payload.free_period_source: CIP-0119 (live since June 2026): transfer preapprovals get a free 90-day base duration before standard traffic cost applies.
output_payload.disambiguation: Computes synchronizer traffic economics for a single message/envelope. For settlement/counterparty structure validation on Canton, see diagnose_canton_readiness (art-503), validate_canton_dvp_atomicity (art-507), and validate_canton_party_allowlist (art-509) -- those validate structure, this computes traffic cost.
